sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13107" key="*)apollwnotrafh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀπολλωνο-τρᾰφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n13107.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nourished by Apollo,</tr_> Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:11:23:291" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.23.291</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
